thanks the movie was great... lia Steen
cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Jeffrey,
I let Kosslyn know you'll see him at Science Center
Cafeteria, Tues 11am.

On 1/28/06, J. Epstein jeeproject@yahoo.com wrote:

, no kosslyn is a priority

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Jeffrey, sorry, I should've reminded you: Dr.
Basoum

will see you for sure
on Tue, he's just not sure about what time. They
will call on Mon w/ time. I
will hold off from pinpointing anything w/ Steve
Kosslyn on Tues, unless you
tell me otherwise.

Cecilia

On 1/28/06, J. Epstein jeeproject@yahoo.com
wrote:

yes, put onm calendar

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com
wrote:

Hi Cecilia:

Jeffrey suggested a meeting with George
Church

at

11:00 on Tuesday.
This works for both George and me. Shall we
meet

him

in the Science
Center cafeteria, as usual?

Thanks,
s.

--
